role: This directory contains prompt template building blocks for the ArchSpine mirror system, including factories for architecture diagram prompts, reusable markdown block rendering, example role descriptions, schema definitions, and a unified export point.
responsibility: Collectively, these components provide a reusable toolkit for constructing structured AI agent prompts by aggregating schema definitions, rendering functions, few-shot examples, and prompt template factories for various contexts like architecture diagram generation.

children.role: Prompt template factory for generating architecture diagram views. Consumed by the view derivation pipeline to produce structured LLM prompts.
Prompt Template Rendering Utility — generates standardized Markdown text blocks for constructing AI agent prompts and structured documents within the ArchSpine mirror system.
Prompt template asset providing few-shot examples for architectural role descriptions, used by AI agents during source code summarization.
Barrel file / module entry point for prompt template building blocks in the ArchSpine prompt generation system.
Schema definition file providing the canonical output contract for all ArchSpine summary units (source files, documents, configs, folders, projects).
